---
title: "Robert Arthur Talbot Gascoyne-Cecil, 3rd Marquess of Sal"
---

## Robert Arthur Talbot Gascoyne-Cecil, 3rd Marquess of Sal

**Dates:** (1830-1903)

### Description

prime minister

### Biography

He married (1857), Georgiana Caroline Alderson (1827-1899);  he was styled Lord Robert Cecil to 1865, then Viscount Cranborne until succeeding his father in 1868;  he served as Prime Minister 1885-6, 1886-7, 1887-92, 1895-1900, 1900-2. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 5 th 1900
- Letter from [autumn 1885]
- Letter from May 1st 1876
- Letter from August 13. [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
